subject: Qwilfish, a small round spiny pufferfish-like Pokemon covered in sharp spikes, depicted charging forward with dramatic motion energy
description: A small round pufferfish-like Pokemon bristling with sharp spikes surges forward through dramatic red and white motion lines. Its body is dark blue-teal with a cream underside and large pink-red cheek patches. The spikes covering its body are clearly visible, radiating outward in all directions. The dramatic swooping energy lines and dark background give the image an intense, high-speed action feel, emphasizing the creature's combative and poisonous nature. The composition is a dynamic close-up, with the creature filling most of the frame.
foreground: Qwilfish charging forward surrounded by red motion-energy lines
background: Abstract dark background with dramatic red and white motion streaks
